_comment: Sanctioned lite->full rewrites for the detector-proportionality SHARED-BLOCK. These are the ONLY blessed differences between the dev-rigor-stack and dev-rigor-stack-lite copies; any other drift fails the lite-parity CI job. Applied after whitespace collapse by fleet-smoke's parity_check.py.
from: [deterministic-detector](https://github.com/scottconverse/deterministic-detector) CI jobs, plus its editor hook on hosts that support it; degrade silently if absent
to: deterministic-detector plugin + its CI jobs; degrade silently if absent

from: Low blast: same-turn lint feedback is enough
to: Low blast: the plugin's ruff hook feedback is enough

from: no agent ever touches required-status-check or branch-protection settings
to: no agent ever touches the required-status flip
